hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=release-snapshot
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 1 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -z "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The working tree is not clean."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" README.md docs/guide-draft.md docs/old-checklist.md | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct."

fixtureFiles.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -eu
rm -rf release-snapshot
mkdir -p release-snapshot
git -C release-snapshot init -q -b main
git -C release-snapshot config --local user.name "ZoeSkoul Learner"
git -C release-snapshot config --local user.email "learner@zoeskoul.local"
cd release-snapshot
printf %s '# Volunteer Toolkit
' > README.md
cd ..
cd release-snapshot
mkdir -p docs
printf %s '# Draft Volunteer Guide
' > docs/guide-draft.md
cd ..
cd release-snapshot
mkdir -p docs
printf %s 'Old checklist
' > docs/old-checklist.md
cd ..
git -C release-snapshot add -A
git -C release-snapshot commit -q -m 'Add project baseline'

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=release-snapshot
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 1 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -n "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The exercise change is missing."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" README.md docs/old-checklist.md docs/volunteer-guide.md | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct."
expected_staged=$(printf "%s\n" docs/volunteer-guide.md | sort)
actual_staged=$(git -C "$repo" diff --cached --name-only | sort)
[ "$actual_staged" = "$expected_staged" ] || fail "The staged file set is not correct."

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=release-snapshot
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 1 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -n "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The exercise change is missing."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" README.md docs/volunteer-guide.md | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct."
expected_staged=$(printf "%s\n" docs/old-checklist.md docs/volunteer-guide.md | sort)
actual_staged=$(git -C "$repo" diff --cached --name-only | sort)
[ "$actual_staged" = "$expected_staged" ] || fail "The staged file set is not correct."
[ ! -e "$repo/docs/old-checklist.md" ]

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=release-snapshot
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 1 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -n "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The exercise change is missing."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" .gitignore README.md docs/volunteer-guide.md | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct."
expected_staged=$(printf "%s\n" .gitignore docs/old-checklist.md docs/volunteer-guide.md | sort)
actual_staged=$(git -C "$repo" diff --cached --name-only | sort)
[ "$actual_staged" = "$expected_staged" ] || fail "The staged file set is not correct."
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q preview.log

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=release-snapshot
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 1 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -n "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The exercise change is missing."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" .gitignore README.md docs/volunteer-guide.md | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct."
expected_staged=$(printf "%s\n" .gitignore docs/old-checklist.md docs/volunteer-guide.md | sort)
actual_staged=$(git -C "$repo" diff --cached --name-only | sort)
[ "$actual_staged" = "$expected_staged" ] || fail "The staged file set is not correct."
grep -Fxq "# Volunteer Toolkit" "$repo/README.md"
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q preview.log

#!/usr/bin/env bash

git -C release-snapshot config --local user.email "learner@zoeskoul.local"
cd release-snapshot

' > README.md

' > docs/guide-draft.md
cd ..

printf %s 'Old checklist
' > docs/old-checklist.md
cd ..
git -C release-snapshot add -A
git -C release-snapshot commit -q -m 'Add project baseline'
cd release-snapshot
printf %s 'local preview
' > preview.log
cd ..
cd release-snapshot
printf %s 'Accidental rewrite
' > README.md
cd ..
cd release-snapshot
printf %s '*.log
' > .gitignore
cd ..
git -C release-snapshot mv docs/guide-draft.md docs/volunteer-guide.md
git -C release-snapshot rm -q docs/old-checklist.md
git -C release-snapshot add .gitignore

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=release-snapshot
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 2 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -z "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The working tree is not clean."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" .gitignore README.md docs/volunteer-guide.md | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" log -1 --format=%s)" = 'Prepare clean volunteer release' ] || fail "The latest commit message is not correct."
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q preview.log

learningGoals: Audit the repository before structural work begins
Stage a related rename and removal
Create and verify a precise ignore policy
Restore an unrelated accidental edit without disturbing staged cleanup
Commit and verify the final clean release snapshot
